title: derris hainanensis
intro: Derris hainanensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to Hainan Island in China. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and treating gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Derris hainanensis is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
